title: docs: README's entire Atlas Compatibility section is copy-paste broken: every command references examples/atlas/ma…
description:
[P1 · docs · audit] README's entire Atlas Compatibility section is copy-paste broken: every command references examples/atlas/manifest.fitkind-mobile.v1.json and session-index.fitkind-mobile.v1.json, which do not exist (actual files are manifest.example-app.v1.json / example-brand). The brand-aware link points to manifest.fitkind-brand-aware.v1.json which is also absent. Three README links use absolute /Users/luke/dev/onlytools/sentinel/... paths that break on any clone.

Evidence: ls examples/atlas/ -> only manifest.example-app.v1.json, manifest.example-brand.v1.json, session-index.example-*.v1.json. ls examples/atlas/manifest.fitkind-brand-aware.v1.json -> No such file. README.md:228,230,254 contain ](/Users/luke/dev/onlytools/sentinel/...) links.

Fix: Update README Atlas examples to the real example-app/example-brand filenames; convert the 3 absolute /Users/luke links to repo-relative paths (docs/atlas-compatibility.md).

Source: launch-readiness audit 2026-06-18
